'''Butler's Cove''' was a previously uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Stribos system/Legends|Stribos system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The planet was chosen by [[Soron Hegerty]] as a refuge for the [[Ssither]] that managed to escape from the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. Unrecorded in Imperial records, it was named for [[Butler (pirate)|the pirate]] who discovered it. He hoped to use the planet as a base from which to raid the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]], but was killed on his first raid. All additional information on the planet perished with him.<ref name="EJ" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Evacuation of Jatee|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
